Dragonflies

Twelve-spotted Skimmer

Common Green Darner

Blue Dasher

Twelve-spotted Skimmer

White-faced Meadowhawk

Widdow Skimmer

Dragonflies are agile fliers and skilled hunters, often found near water where they lay their eggs. Their vibrant colors and intricate wing patterns make them a favorite subject for insect photography. In this gallery, you can explore various species of dragonflies, each captured in moments of flight or rest, showcasing their unique beauty and behavior.

Dragonfly Galleries

This section gathers dragonfly encounters by species and field setting, from skimmers darting over ponds to meadowhawks perched on grasses. Each gallery focuses on posture, behavior, habitat, and the visual details that make these insects worth a closer look.

Twelve-spotted Skimmer
A dynamic shot of a Twelve-spotted Skimmer captured mid-flight, showcasing its distinctive wing pattern and vibrant colors.
Camera: Canon EOS 5D Mark IV
Lens: EF100-400mm f/4.5-5.6L IS USM
Settings: ISO 800 * Aperture f/14.0 * Shutter 1/640 s
D79A3834 • Size: 800 x 533

Common Green Darner
A serene image of a Common Green Darner perched on a leaf, its wings folded back and body displaying its characteristic green coloration.
Camera: Canon EOS 5D Mark IV
Lens: EF100-400mm f/4.5-5.6L IS USM
Settings: ISO 800 * Aperture f/14.0 * Shutter 1/640 s
E21A5010 • Size: 800 x 533

Blue Dasher
A Blue Dasher rests on a rock near the water's edge, its vibrant blue body contrasting with the natural surroundings.
Camera: Canon EOS 5D Mark IV
Lens: EF100-400mm f/4.5-5.6L IS USM
Settings: ISO 800 * Aperture f/14.0 * Shutter 1/640 s
E22A5250 • Size: 800 x 533

Autumn Meadowhawk
An Autumn Meadowhawk is captured perched on a blade of grass, its reddish body and delicate wings highlighted in the soft light.
Camera: Canon EOS 5D Mark IV
Lens: EF100-400mm f/4.5-5.6L IS USM
Settings: ISO 800 * Aperture f/14.0 * Shutter 1/640 s
D79A0209 • Size: 800 x 533

Halloween Pennant
A Halloween Pennant is perched on a branch with its wings spread, showcasing its vibrant orange and black pattern.
Camera: Canon EOS 5D Mark IV
Lens: EF100-400mm f/4.5-5.6L IS USM
Settings: ISO 800 * Aperture f/14.0 * Shutter 1/640 s
E21A2116 • Size: 2400 x

White-faced Meadowhawk
A White-faced Meadowhawk is captured perched on a leaf, its wings folded back and distinctive white face clearly visible.
Camera: Canon EOS 5D Mark IV
Lens: EF100-400mm f/4.5-5.6L IS USM
Settings: ISO 800 * Aperture f/14.0 * Shutter 1/640 s
E21A3927 • Size: 800 x 533

Widdow Skimmer
A Widdow Skimmer is perched on a twig with its wings spread, displaying its distinctive black and white wing pattern.
Camera: Canon EOS 5D Mark IV
Lens: EF100-400mm f/4.5-5.6L IS USM
Settings: ISO 800 * Aperture f/14.0 * Shutter 1/640 s
E21A1832 • Size: 800 x 533
